vBRIEFInfo.description: Implementation iteration vBRIEF for #1348 after the original story artifact was found in completed/ while the GitHub issue remained open.

narratives.Description: Implement the #1348 two-tier session ritual sentinel and verifier against the current directive master. This iteration exists because the prior #1348 vBRIEF is marked completed even though the GitHub issue remains open and the implementation surfaces are absent.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: Add a separate .deft/ritual-state.json state contract beside the existing fail-open last-session sentinel, implement task session:start and task verify:session-ritual, wire gated verification into vbrief:preflight, add the typed staleness policy field, update AGENTS/template/headless documentation, and cover the new contract with focused CLI/content/policy tests.
narratives.UserStory: As a directive maintainer, I want session-start ritual completion verified by a fail-closed gate before implementation dispatch, so skipped startup discipline is caught deterministically and headless workers can bypass it explicitly.

items.title: Add ritual-state data model and atomic writer

narrative.Acceptance: .deft/ritual-state.json has a strict schema, writes atomically, preserves the existing #1269 last-session behavior, and keeps both sentinels under the .deft umbrella.
task session:start records quick-tier steps and deferrals; task verify:session-ritual fails closed for missing, stale, corrupt, wrong-worktree, or failed state while supporting --tier and --json.

items.title: Wire gated ritual verification into implementation preflight

narrative.Acceptance: task vbrief:preflight invokes the gated ritual verifier before the #810 lifecycle check unless DEFT_SESSION_RITUAL_SKIP=1 is set, and JSON callers receive a stable failure payload.
plan.policy.sessionRitualStalenessHours defaults to 4, rejects malformed values, appears in policy:show, and participates in vBRIEF validation.

items.title: Update docs, templates, CI, and tests

narrative.Acceptance: AGENTS.md, templates/agents-entry.md, templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md, CI env, CHANGELOG, and deterministic tests all reflect the new verifier and bypass contract.

expected_outputs: vBRIEF preflight passes with explicit headless bypass
quick-tier verifier reports fresh state after task session:start
policy show reports current/default staleness window
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Issue #1348 already carries the detailed trace set; this active iteration exists to satisfy the current implementation gate after stale completed lifecycle metadata was discovered.

references.title: Issue #1348: feat(ritual): two-tier ritual sentinel + fail-closed verifier for the pre-start_agent gate stack
Prior #1348 artifact cancelled after this implementation became canonical
